original_statement: which pre-crisis superhero first appeared as "absorbency boy," but then became someone else?
mutated_statement: which pre-crisis character first appeared as "absorbency boy," but then became someone else and yet remained that original persona?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Paradoxical/contradictory clause addition: "superhero" → "character" (scope broadened) | Added contradictory persistence "and yet remained that original persona" (but then became someone else → but then became someone else and yet remained that original persona)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和执行链可见关键事实：judge_thought写明“Earth-Man (Kirt Niedrigh) … first appeared as 'Absorbency Boy' … later known as Earth-Man while maintaining the original persona”。Agent没有指出矛盾无法解，而是直接用数据条目解释并调和矛盾，认为存在既“变成别人”又“保持原来身份”的实例。具体表现为检索到匹配条目后给出合理由述，而非拒绝或请求澄清。因此应归为“逻辑解释合理化”：系统识别到矛盾但通过事实/语境说明矛盾在该语料中可被同时满足，从而给出答案。
